title: Brotein Personal Stats screen — Premium-active simulator build
html:
iPhone-16-Plus simulator capture of the brotein Personal Stats screen — 146g daily protein goal for a 15-year-old, 146 lbs, Build-Muscle goal, Beta-Alanine in stack, Premium Active subscription state visible. Confirms the September-2025 build had subscription gating and "Your personal data stays private" copy live.

brotein · ios · xcode
